summary: Completed testing of Student Payments and 'Other' Skill Option features. All features are working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) Student Payments tab in Admin Orders displays converted students with Details modal showing conversion info, 2) 'Other' skill option with text input works on /add page (Student & Teacher tabs), Admin Student CRM Add Lead form, and Educator Funnel page (/educator)

student_payments_tab.details: Student Payments tab displays converted students (Usha Bihani, Trillion Daga). Details modal shows Student Information, Enrollment Details (skill, age_group, learning_mode, center, city, demo_date), and Payment Details.

inquiry_page_student_other_skill.details: /add page Student tab has 'Other' skill option. When selected, text input appears for custom skill specification.

inquiry_page_teacher_other_skill.details: /add page Teacher tab has 'Other' skill option. When selected, text input appears for custom skill specification.

admin_student_crm_other_skill.details: Admin Student CRM Add Lead form has 'Other' option in Skill Interest dropdown. When selected, text input appears for custom skill.

educator_funnel_other_skill.details: /educator page has 'Other' skill option in Skills You Can Teach section. When selected, text input appears for custom skill.

backend_student_payments_api.details: /api/orders/student-payments endpoint returns 200 with list of converted students including conversion_details.
